title: brachyscome scapigera
intro: Brachyscome scapigera, also known as the small daisy bush, is a flowering shrub native to Australia, characterized by its small white or pink daisy-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Brachyscome scapigera include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
